headlines.title: Trump seeks payback against Republicans who opposed him in today's primaries
headlines.description: President Donald Trump's revenge tour against dissident Republicans hits Indiana's primaries on Tuesday, as he and allies try to unseat seven Republican state senators who voted last year against a Trump-backed congressional map

headlines.title: Republicans fret over Iowa as tough midterm races develop
headlines.description: Vice President JD Vance will visit Iowa Tuesday — a trip meant to help endangered Rep. Zach Nunn in a state where the GOP also faces issues in big races for the Senate and governor.

headlines.title: Republicans propose $1 billion in taxpayer dollars to secure Trump ballroom
headlines.description: President Donald Trump portrayed the big new ballroom that he’s building on White House grounds as a gift to the nation, courtesy of patriotic private donors.

headlines.title: How a single psychedelic trip may cause physical changes in the brain
headlines.description: A single psychedelic trip may cause physical changes in the brain that could explain why some people report psychological benefits from the experience, a small study suggests.

headlines.title: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni Settle ‘It Ends With Us’ Legal Battle
headlines.description: Blake Lively attended the Met Gala on Monday after reaching a settlement with former co-star and director Justin Baldoni, bringing an abrupt end to their year-long legal battle. Lively sued Baldoni and his production company for waging what she called a smear campaign against her after she accused him of sexual harassment on the set of their 2024 film “It Ends With Us,” which Baldoni consistently denied. NBC’s Laura Jarrett reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Passenger Stuck on Cruise With Hantavirus Outbreak Speaks Out
headlines.description: Nearly 150 passengers, including 17 Americans, are trapped on a cruise ship off the coast of West Africa after seven possible cases of hantavirus have now been identified aboard, according to the World Health Organization. The suspected outbreak has killed at least three people and two other patients onboard the ship are being prepared for evacuation. NBC’s Camila Bernal reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Spirit Airlines doomed by high fuel prices due to 'recent geopolitical events,' court docs state
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines said in court papers filed Monday that it was forced to ground its fleet for good over the weekend because "recent geopolitical events resulted in a massive and sustained increase in fuel prices."While the court papers did not specify the nature of those geopolitical events, jet fuel prices have soared in the two months since the start of the war in Iran."The Debtors and their advisors searched for increased capital and any sources of savings or liquidity, leaving no option unexp

headlines.title: Trump signs Presidential Fitness Test proclamation
headlines.description: Trump signs Presidential Fitness Test proclamation

headlines.title: Car captured driving onto sidewalk after child on bike
headlines.description: Car captured driving onto sidewalk after child on bike

headlines.title: Sec. Hegseth and Gen. Caine on kamikaze dolphins
headlines.description: During a press conference on the war with Iran, Defense Secretary Hegseth and General Caine were asked about reports of "kamikaze dolphins" in the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: GameStop makes $56B bid to buy eBay
headlines.description: GameStop makes $56B bid to buy eBay
